ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Both the formula and the results will both be displayed in preview mode.
ast.target: 公式和结果都将在预览模式下显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls position of the re-roll button
ast.target: 控制重新掷骰按钮的位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use this as the number of faces when it is omitted.
ast.target: 当省略时，使用此值作为面数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determine the rounding behavior for dice results.
ast.target: 确定骰子结果的舍入行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive results will show a '+'. This setting has no effect on negative results.
ast.target: 正数结果将显示 '+'。此设置对负数结果无效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lookup table rolls will display the rolled number along with the result.
ast.target: 查找表掷骰将同时显示掷出的数字和结果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Randomly rolled sections will have a copy-content button to easy add result to clipboard.
ast.target: 随机掷出的部分将有一个复制内容按钮，便于将结果添加到剪贴板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables random link rolling with the link parameter. Override by specifying a section type.
ast.target: 启用使用链接参数的随机链接掷骰。可通过指定部分类型来覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select between Genesys or SWRPG symbols.
ast.target: 在 Genesys 或 SWRPG 符号之间选择。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle between text and symbol results.
ast.target: 在文本和符号结果之间切换。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The dice view can always be opened using the command from the command palette.
ast.target: 骰子视图始终可以使用命令面板中的命令打开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Dice rolls from dice view will be displayed on screen.
ast.target: 来自骰子视图的骰子掷骰将显示在屏幕上。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rendered dice will stay on screen for this number of milliseconds. Leave blank to require a click to clear dice.
ast.target: 渲染的骰子将在屏幕上停留此毫秒数。留空则需要点击才能清除骰子。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rendered dice will be varied colors based on the dice type. This will override manually set dice and text colors.
ast.target: 渲染的骰子将根据骰子类型显示不同颜色。这将覆盖手动设置的骰子和文本颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control the size of rendered dice.

ast.target: 渲染的骰子将使用此颜色显示其数字。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 添加新的公式快捷方式。

ast.target: THREE.PerspectiveCamera.setLens 已弃用。请使用 .setFocalLength 和 .filmGauge 进行摄影设置。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.BufferAttribute: .length has been deprecated. Use .count instead.

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.BufferAttribute: .dynamic has been deprecated. Use .usage instead.

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.BufferAttribute: .setDynamic() has been deprecated. Use .setUsage() instead.

ast.name: warn
ast.target: THREE.BufferGeometry: .addAttribute() 现在需要 ( name, attribute )。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: THREE.BufferGeometry.addAttribute: 请使用 .setIndex() 设置索引属性。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.InterleavedBuffer: .setDynamic() has been deprecated. Use .setUsage() instead.

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE. ShaderMaterial: .derivatives has been moved to .extensions.derivatives.

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.WebGLRenderer: .clearTarget() has been deprecated. Use .setRenderTarget() and .clear() instead.
ast.target: THREE.WebGLRenderer: .clearTarget() 已弃用。请改用 .setRenderTarget() 和 .clear()。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.Audio: .load has been deprecated. Use THREE.AudioLoader instead.
ast.target: THREE.Audio: .load 已弃用。请改用 THREE.AudioLoader。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.ImageUtils.loadTexture has been deprecated. Use THREE.TextureLoader() instead.
ast.target: THREE.ImageUtils.loadTexture 已弃用。请改用 THREE.TextureLoader()。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: THREE.ImageUtils.loadTextureCube has been deprecated. Use THREE.CubeTextureLoader() instead.
ast.target: THREE.ImageUtils.loadTextureCube 已弃用。请改用 THREE.CubeTextureLoader()。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WARNING: Multiple instances of Three.js being imported.
ast.target: 警告：检测到多个 Three.js 实例被导入。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 修饰符仅允许用于骰子掷骰。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 默认面必须是一个数字。

ast.name: Notice

ast.name: Notice
